title: Building a GDP Risk Assessment
alt: Five-step GDP risk assessment process based on the ICH Q9 lifecycle

items.label: Define scope & team
items.desc: Involve quality, operations, logistics and the Responsible Person

items.label: Identify hazards
items.desc: Work through each GDP chapter: premises, ops, returns, transport

items.label: Analyse & evaluate
items.desc: Score severity, probability and detectability consistently

items.label: Control & communicate
items.desc: Assign owners, deadlines and verification evidence per action

items.label: Review
items.desc: Set triggers: new lane, changed partner, deviation, regulation
